title: calochortus nuttallii var. aureus
intro: Calochortus nuttallii var. aureus, also known as the golden mariposa lily, is a variant of the Mariposa lily species that is native to the western regions of North America. The plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, making it useful for treating wounds and skin conditions. The golden mariposa lily has been reported to have various health benefits, including reducing inflammation and improving digestive health, due to its high concentration of flavonoids and saponins. Herbal preparations of the plant, such as tinctures and infusions, have been used to treat a range of health issues, although further research is needed to confirm its efficacy and safety.
